name: 金句型（霸氣宣言）
description: 角色用一句精煉的話宣示立場或反擊對手，適合做短視頻切片的高光台詞。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: That's only for now. Soon enough, I'll make him the richest man in the north. / But I'm already the richest man in the south. What's the point? / Not only are we not going to get divorced, we're going to have the most grand wedding.
